steps.title: Read the flower counts from the bar graph
steps.content: From the bar graph, Orchid = 140, Lily = 100, Tulip = 120, Sunflower = 180, Daisy = 160.

steps.title: Test each pair for a sum of 280
steps.content:
Orchid + Lily = 140 + 100 = 240 (not 280)
Tulip + Lily = 120 + 100 = 220 (not 280)
Orchid + Sunflower = 140 + 180 = 320 (not 280)
Tulip + Daisy = 120 + 160 = 280 (matches target)
That matches choice D — D is correct.
